Senior Backend Engineer (Python)
Acme Corp — Remote, LATAM-friendly

We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer with 5+ years of experience to join
our distributed team.

Stack
- Python 3.11+
- FastAPI
- PostgreSQL
- Redis
- Docker / Kubernetes

Requirements
- 5+ years building production backends
- Strong English (C1 minimum) — daily standups in English
- Comfortable working asynchronously across LATAM timezones
- Experience with REST API design and event-driven systems

What we offer
- Salary range: $90k - $130k USD
- 100% remote, work from anywhere in the Americas
- 4-day work week pilot
